fields.acceptance_criteria: WebGPU-accelerated 3D graph rendering using wgpu from WASM; force-directed or hierarchical layout; state-colored nodes with TicketCard rendering; edge lines with arrowheads; camera orbit/pan/zoom; click node to open; falls back to SVG when WebGPU unavailable
fields.title: Feature: GPU 3D dependency graph via WebGPU
